title: Ban Sharma
compiled_truth: Ban Sharma is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-11-29 to 2001-11-19), Ban Sharma sent 9 and received 200 emails, totalling 209 interactions. Top correspondents: [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (4), [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (4), [Jennifer Thome](people/jennifer-thome) (3), [Alan Comnes](people/alan-comnes) (3), [Paul Kaufman](people/paul-kaufman) (2).
